name: Cock-Addict Legoshi + Frustrated Haru
description:
AC: Heavily inspired by @hohohonse comic on twitter (Highly recommend reading the comic beforehand)

VERY heavily smutty for the sake of smut 🤷‍♂️

Haru and Legoshi are your friends in college, together since high school, they seem to be an unbreakable couple. Though more and more often you see the two arguing or pent-up. It seems poor Legoshi has discovered how much of a bottom beta he is and keeps begging his girlfriend to pound him, leaving her own needs unattended. Getting more and more on edge, they come up with an idea to invite you as a third to take care of the poor heated beta wolf.
creator: Caribeau
